overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character riding a horse through a misty grassland at dawn. The camera follows the rider through open meadows, across a shallow stream, and past scattered trees as fog settles in the valley ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland meadow with scattered trees

agents.ego_description: riding a horse at a steady canter through tall grass toward distant trees

entered.detail: large oak tree standing alone on the left side of the meadow
cluster of trees visible in the misty distance ahead
fog-covered hills forming the backdrop of the scene

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide, misty grassland at dawn. The rider moves steadily through tall green grass toward a solitary tree on the left and a cluster of distant trees ahead, with fog settling in the background hills.

scene_state.functional_zone: meadow with stream crossing and approaching trees

events.description: horse crosses a shallow stream with visible water ripples

agents.ego_description: guiding the horse across a small creek and continuing through taller grass toward a large tree

entered.detail: shallow creek with clear water cutting through the grass
tall oak tree with dense green foliage on the right side

segments.scene_description: The rider approaches and crosses a small stream in the meadow. The solitary tree on the left falls behind as a large oak tree on the right grows larger in the frame. The distant trees ahead become more defined as the fog slightly lifts.

events.description: riding closely past the large oak tree on the right
entering a denser fog bank as the terrain ascends

agents.ego_description: riding uphill past the large tree and heading into a fog-covered valley

entered.detail: dense white fog settling in the valley ahead reducing visibility
scattered rocks visible in the grass near the path

segments.scene_description: The rider passes close to the large oak tree on the right and continues ascending a gentle hill. The stream falls behind as the scene opens into a valley filled with dense fog. Rocky patches appear in the grass as visibility decreases toward the fog bank.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a misty grassland at dawn that gradually ascends toward a dense fog bank in a valley. It begins with the rider moving steadily through tall green grass toward a solitary tree and a distant cluster of woods under a hazy morning sky. As the rider crosses a small stream, the solitary tree falls behind and a large oak on the right grows larger in the frame while the distant trees become more defined as the fog slightly lifts. The scene then shifts as the rider passes the oak and climbs a gentle hill, leaving the stream behind. Finally, the terrain opens into a valley filled with thick fog, where rocky patches appear in the grass as visibility decreases toward the encroaching white mist.
